assets.prompt: A high-fidelity technical UI wireframe for a Tetris game, focus on game board and side panels, neon cyberpunk style, clean lines, architectural layout.
neon tetris grid board game UI layout
Detailed game UI wireframe for Tetris, featuring score, level, and next-piece preview, technical vector style.

A precise technical wireframe and UI/UX asset for a Tetris game interface, featuring a 10x20 main grid, next piece preview panel, score and level display, lock delay and soft drop speed indicators, state feedback overlays, clean grid-aligned layout, high-contrast functional components, vector-style wireframe, no artistic effects, ComfyUI Flux.1 optimized.
